items.name_cn:
【Nano Diane Bag】M14194 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
The Nano Diane in two-tone Monogram Empreinte HlLt leather is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all the key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
Size: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: 【Overseas Exclusive】M12099 Black, Small. 🔥 Double-sided. This legendary Neverfull BB handbag always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a stylish city tote. Loosen the drawstrings to revert to a chic and practical handbag. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. The version shown is made of Damier Azur canvas.

items.name_cn:
【Pico Side Trunk Handbag】 m83018 46358
The Pico Side Trunk handbag combines Monogram canvas with leather trim, referencing the brand's classic hard suitcases with the S-lock closure and metal corners to pay homage to Louis Vuitton's travel heritage. The handle and adjustable shoulder strap are detachable, and a secure zipper completes the functional details.
Size: 14.0 x 10.0 x 6.5 cm
